906 WHEEL_150_INTRM_CD WHEEL_150_INTRM_CD GG0170S5 Wheel 150 feet (Interim Perf) CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the resident's ability to wheel 150 feet during this assessment period plus the two previous calendar days. 06=Independent 
05=Setup or clean-up assistance 
04=Supervision or touching assistance 
03=Partial/moderate assistance 
02=Substantial/maximal assistance 
01=Dependent
